description: Canadian outlaw motorcycle club founded in 1972 in Albert County, New Brunswick. It is the third largest Canadian one-percenter motorcycle club with seventeen chapters across five provinces. The club has been involved in drug trafficking and has expanded through patching over other clubs.

country_links.evidence_quote: The Bacchus Motorcycle Club ( BMC ) is an Outlaw motorcycle club in Canada.
country_links.context: The organization is based in Canada, with chapters in multiple provinces, and carries out activities such as trafficking and expansion within Canada.
